clips.name: switchlight-ab-photoreal-clean
clips.prompt: Use this clean 12-panel photoreal storyboard grid as the source for a 15-second LUMINA Switchlight music video. Read panels left to right, top to bottom. Animate each panel as a quick cinematic snapshot in order: backstage mirror nerves, chrome jacket spark, room lights switch on, hallway exit, Yumi and Sena hallway glow, Sena vocal close-up, vanity mirror future, Nari switch cue, hook formation, step-pose-shine hit, Jia and Nari rap charge, final group hero under chrome arch. Keep the same five fictional members and the same pearl/chrome/black wardrobe with baby-pink accents throughout. Do not duplicate members, change outfits, change hairstyles, add text, add logos, or add products. Use premium photoreal music-video motion: quick cuts, match cuts, mirror cuts, hallway tracking, low-angle performance hits, clean orbit motion, realistic hair and fabric movement, floor contact, and natural reflections. Final group hero holds for the last 1 second. No annotations, no captions, no watermark, no real celebrity likenesses, no copied choreography, no anime, no sketch look, no plastic CGI, no melted bodies, no floating feet.
